buildCommand: cd ../.. && pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=web
comments: Set the Vercel Project's Root Directory to apps/web. The build runs from
the monorepo root so Turbo builds web's workspace deps (@workspace/ui etc.)
first. Streaming API responses proxy through Next route handlers; fluid
compute allows up to 300s, which covers the capped AI streams.
Env (Project Settings, per environment): NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL (the Render
